text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.28 — voice api & model avalanches

18 PRs merged this week. We shipped real-time voice, rewrote the docs generator, and plugged in enough new models to heat a small apartment.

───

→ MODELS & VOICE
Real-time voice and audio API is live. We also added Claude Opus 4.8, Perplexity Sonar, Helix AI, and StepFun. Phase 1 of our model shuffle is done: 6 new models added, 5 opened to the free tier. 

→ INFRASTRUCTURE
Rewrote the API docs generator with a custom markdown builder because off-the-shelf tools never quite do what you want. R2 storage now refreshes TTL on access, keeping active cached items alive longer. 

→ ECONOMICS
Phase 1 of country-routed checkout is in. Developer earnings exports now expose baseline prices and USD costs so you can actually see the margins.

→ THE GREENHOUSE
Six new apps built by the community hit the showcase, including RagmyAI, SceneWeave, and PetalGen. The ecosystem is getting crowded in a good way.

All code is open. Start building at pollinations.ai

#OpenSource #AI #WebDev #APIs
